hypothesis: The interpolation weight κ in Score-Based Interpolation, when dynamically conditioned on local energy curvature information rather than solely on relative log-densities, will enable ASTRA to distinguish and selectively sample higher-index saddle points (second-order or above) on the potential energy surface, thereby extending the method's applicability to the characterization of bifurcation points and reaction network branch points that are inaccessible to current first-order saddle point searches.
